parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT h.symbol, h.user_id, u.alerts_chat_id, u.private_chat_id FROM holdings h JOIN users u ON h.user_id = u.id WHERE h.net_quantity > 0 AND u.is_active = true UNION SELECT DISTINCT a.symbol, a.user_id, u.alerts_chat_id, u.private_chat_id FROM alerts a JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 'active' AND u.is_active = true
INSERT INTO pattern_alerts_log (user_id, symbol, pattern_type, alert_date) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) ON CONFLICT (user_id, symbol, pattern_type, alert_date) DO NOTHING RETURNING id

additionalFields.reply_markup: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inline_keyboard: [[ { text: '📊 Full Analysis', callback_data: 'predict_' + $('Format Pattern Notifications').item.json.symbol }, { text: '🔔 Set Alert', callback_data: 'alert_prompt_' + $('Format Pattern Notifications').item.json.symbol } ]] }) }}
